ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aban Offshore Limited, a company currently undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), has announced the resignation of Mr. Krishnamurthy Vijayan as an Independent Director, effective July 22, 2026. While citing personal reasons and other professional commitments, this departure materially impacts governance and further underscores the severe financial distress indicated by the ongoing CIRP, serving as a significant red flag for stakeholders.
